Socials

Dmytro Havrylyuk

I build product solutions by combining market research, GTM planning, and data‐driven analysis, using SQL, PowerBI, and Python to uncover insights, and Figma to prototype intuitive, user‐ready experiences. I work at the intersection of product and data, shaping abstract concepts into clear user flows, analytics backed narratives, and stakeholder ready pitches that scale outcomes.

Services I Offer
GTM Strategy & Competitive Analysis
Market sizing, segment mapping, competitive positioning decks, and launch plans for tech products.
AI-Powered Dashboard Builds
Interactive tools using Claude API, Power BI, or custom HTML/JS for product and marketing teams.
Data Pipeline Automation
Python and Power Automate workflows for data ingestion, transformation, and automated reporting.
Portfolio & Case Study Writing
PMM case studies, product teardowns, and portfolio decks designed for top tech company applications.
